name: AD LDAP
description: App specifically designed for interacting with Microsoft Active Directory's LDAP Implementation

actions.name: Add Group Members
actions.description: Adds one or more Active Directory objects to one or more groups

parameters.name: use_samaccountname
parameters.description: Specify members AND groups as sAMAccountName(s) instead of distinguishedName(s) (note: member AND groups will use sAMAccountName if selected)

parameters.name: members
parameters.description: Semi-colon (';') separated list of users. If 'use samaccountname' is false, then these must be distinguishedName(s)

parameters.name: groups
parameters.description: Semi-colon (';') separated list of groups to which the members will be added. If 'use samaccountname' is false, then these must be distinguishedName(s)

actions.name: Remove Group Members
actions.description: Removes one or more Active Directory objects from one or more groups

parameters.name: use_samaccountname
parameters.description: Specify members AND groups as sAMAccountName(s) instead of distinguishedName(s)

parameters.name: members
parameters.description: Semi-colon (';') separated list of users. If 'use samaccountname' is false, then these must be distinguishedName(s)

parameters.name: groups
parameters.description: Semi-colon (';') separated list of groups from which the members will be removed. If 'use samaccountname' is false, then these must be distinguishedName(s)

actions.name: Unlock Account
actions.description: Unlocks a locked Active Directory account

parameters.name: use_samaccountname
parameters.description: Use sAMAccountName for user instead of distinguishedName(s)

parameters.name: user
parameters.description: Specify the user to unlock. If 'use samaccountname' is false, then this must be the user's distinguishedName

parameters.name: use_samaccountname
parameters.description: Specify sAMAccountName instead of distinguishedName

parameters.name: user
parameters.description: Specify the user to disable. If 'use samaccountname' is false, then this must be the user's distinguishedName

actions.name: Enable Account
actions.description: Enables a disabled Active Directory account

parameters.name: use_samaccountname
parameters.description: Specify sAMAccountName instead of distinguishedName

parameters.name: user
parameters.description: Specify the user to enable. If 'use samaccountname' is false, then this must be the user's distinguishedName

actions.name: Reset Password
actions.description: Resets the password of a user, requiring the user to change password at next login

parameters.name: use_samaccountname
parameters.description: Use sAMAccountName instead of distinguishedName

parameters.name: user
parameters.description: User whose attributes are to be modified

parameters.name: use_samaccountname
parameters.description: Specify sAMAccountName instead of distinguishedName

parameters.name: user
parameters.description: Specify the user whose password will be set. If 'use samaccountname' is false, then this must be the user's distinguishedName

parameters.name: password
parameters.description: New password

parameters.name: confirm_password
parameters.description: Re-type the password

actions.name: Move Object
actions.description: Moves an entry in Active Directory

parameters.name: object
parameters.description: Specify the distinguishedName to move

parameters.name: destination_ou
parameters.description: The distinguishedName of the OU the specified object will move to

parameters.name: filter
parameters.description: The LDAP filter (must be in LDAP Syntax)

parameters.name: search_base
parameters.description: The search base to use in its distinguishedName format. If not specified, the 'defaultNamingContext' will be used

parameters.name: attributes
parameters.description: Semi-colon separated list of attributes to collect (e.g. sAMAccountName;mail)

parameters.name: principals
parameters.description: The semi-colon separated principals. These can be sAMAccountName, userprincipalname, or distinguishedName

parameters.name: attributes
parameters.description: Semi-colon separated list of attributes to collect

actions.name: Set Attribute
actions.description: Add, delete, or replace an attribute of a user

parameters.name: use_samaccountname
parameters.description: Use sAMAccountName instead of distinguishedName

parameters.name: user
parameters.description: User whose attributes are to be modified

parameters.name: attribute
parameters.description: The attribute to modify (add/delete/replace)

parameters.name: value
parameters.description: Attribute value

parameters.name: action
parameters.description: Semi-colon separated list of attributes to collect

parameters.name: object
parameters.description: The object to be renamed

parameters.name: use_samaccountname
parameters.description: Use sAMAccountName instead of distinguishedName

parameters.name: new_name
parameters.description: New name for the object
